mapper.delete:
delete from cmp_journal
ytenant_id = #{ytenantId} and srcbillitemid in (select id from ${dbschema_table} where ytenant_id = #{ytenantId} and srcitem = '8' and auditstatus!='1' union select id from ${dbschema_table} where ytenant_id = #{ytenantId} and srcitem = '8' and auditstatus='1' and settlestatus!='2' union select id from ${dbschema_table} where ytenant_id = #{ytenantId} and srcitem = '6' and auditstatus!='1' union select id from ${dbschema_table} where ytenant_id = #{ytenantId} and srcitem = '6' and auditstatus='1' and settlestatus!='2' )
mapper.select: select sum(creditoriSum) creditoriSum,sum(debitoriSum) debitoriSum,sum(creditnatSum) creditnatSum,sum(debitnatSum)debitnatSum,bankaccount,cashaccount,currency,accentity from cmp_journal where ytenant_id = #{ytenantId} and srcbillitemid in (select id from ${dbschema_table} where ytenant_id = #{ytenantId} and srcitem = '8' and auditstatus!='1' union select id from ${dbschema_table} where ytenant_id = #{ytenantId} and srcitem = '8' and auditstatus='1' and settlestatus!='2' union select id from ${dbschema_table} where ytenant_id = #{ytenantId} and srcitem = '6' and auditstatus!='1' union select id from ${dbschema_table} where ytenant_id = #{ytenantId} and srcitem = '6' and auditstatus='1' and settlestatus!='2') GROUP BY bankaccount,cashaccount,currency,accentity
